title: Define Picture Properties
text: Define Picture Properties Define the properties for the picture widget. A picture widget can contain an image, a BLOB, or a glyph. For more information, see Image Name . How to Setting Widget Properties Related Links Widgets In Uniface, widgets are user interface controls. They can display data values, control how values are modified, and determine the appearance of those objects. Most widgets are field-level widgets. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
